summary: Admin Clear Attendance feature fully tested (backend + frontend). All 6 pytest tests + 11 Playwright UI checks passing. E2E flow (create → verify → clear via admin UI → verify deletion) works end-to-end. Regular counselor login with PIN '1' still works (Bus #01 loads with 18 campers).
action_items: SECURITY (non-blocking, for main agent review): POST /api/bus-tracking/clear-attendance has NO server-side auth. The 'admin' PIN check is purely client-side (CounselorApp.jsx line 114). Anyone who knows the URL can delete all bus_attendance records via curl. Recommend adding a shared-secret header, session check, or reuse the admin dashboard passcode (Camp1993) to gate this destructive endpoint.
Minor: clear_attendance endpoint signature uses `dates: list[str]` as body + `bus_number: Optional[str]` query param. Works, but Pydantic model would be cleaner and auto-generate OpenAPI docs better.
critical_code_review_comments: Destructive endpoint POST /api/bus-tracking/clear-attendance (routers/tracking.py:729) has no authentication/authorization. This is a real security issue in production.
ADMIN_PIN='admin' is hardcoded in frontend and trivially bypassable by reading the JS bundle. Fine for client-side UI gating if server-side is secured, but currently server is not secured.

Admin panel UI correctly uses data-testid on all interactive elements (admin-panel, admin-logout-btn, admin-bus-input, admin-select-today/all/none, admin-date-{date}, admin-clear-btn, admin-result, admin-custom-date).
Confirmation dialog (window.confirm) shown before destructive clear — good UX.
Admin panel generates 42 calendar days from 2026-06-29 and correctly skips Sundays, leaving 36 camp days (verified).
clearAttendance uses URL params correctly and sends JSON array body per backend contract.
CounselorApp.jsx is 511 lines — nearing the 700-line guideline ceiling; admin panel is a good candidate for extraction into a sub-component for maintainability.

test_credentials.admin_pin: admin (client-side only, no server auth on clear endpoint)

seed_data_creation: Test creates and cleans up attendance on dates 2026-07-15/16/17/20 for Bus #01 camper Bovell_Austin_11581. All test-created data is cleared by the tests themselves.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Clear Attendance feature verified working end-to-end. Backend endpoint POST /api/bus-tracking/clear-attendance accepts JSON list body and optional bus_number query param, returns {success, deleted, dates, bus_number}. GET attendance endpoint is /api/bus-tracking/attendance/{bus_number}?date=YYYY-MM-DD (NOT /api/bus-tracking/attendance with query params — that returns 405). Login endpoint rejects 'admin' PIN server-side (good). Security concern: destructive clear endpoint has no server-side auth — flagged to main agent.

frontend_playwright.individual_date_toggle: PASS (2026-06-29 Mon Jun 29 first camp day)
frontend_playwright.e2e_ui_clear_flow: PASS (seeded record cleared via admin panel, verified deletion)
